markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Blaxel for content creation, focusing on alignment and timing.](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blaxel seeks educational, high-level technical content for software engineering leaders, not deeply technical articles](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [GrowthX can create this content but has concerns about Blaxel's early stage and lack of existing blog/domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Partnership timing is uncertain; GrowthX suggests Blaxel establish blog foundation before engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Blaxel emphasizes urgency in starting content creation for competitive positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Content Requirements and Audience

  - [Target: Software engineers, engineering leaders, CTOs from tech companies/startups](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Focus: Educational content on AI agents, infrastructure, and related topics](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Depth: High-level technical, not deeply technical (e.g., no extensive code snippets)](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Examples: "What is an agent?", "What is tool calling for agents?", "Why need a new type of cloud?"](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities and Concerns

  - [Can create technical content, but it's a "huge lift" and not scalable for current resources](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Prefers clients with established blogs and domain authority (typically Series B/C+)](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Concerned about Blaxel's early stage, lack of existing content, and technical requirements](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Blaxel's Content Strategy

  - [Two-pronged approach: 1) Hiring technical writer for engineering blog, 2) Broader content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Urgency to start content creation for competitive positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Open to creating initial content during potential 8-week strategy phase with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Partnership Timing and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX suggests Blaxel establish blog foundation (10-20 articles) before engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Blaxel emphasizes immediate need, unwilling to wait until next year](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Tyler to discuss with GrowthX team, considering Blaxel's alignment with core services](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to consult with GrowthX team about potential fit within 48 hours](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [If partnership not viable, Tyler to suggest alternative content creation options for Blaxel](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Blaxel to continue pursuing content strategy, potentially with other partners if GrowthX unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/ctJE9UgA7p4JCQYv6J_DBAJCaDSTdmzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
